item.title: California bill moves to make cheaper alternative fuel available to more drivers
item.description: Lawmakers want to make it easier for drivers to convert cars to run on cheaper ethanol fuel. The agency being bypassed has never approved an E85 conversion kit in 17 years.

item.title: Vandenberg executes back-to-back space, ICBM launches as operations deputy marks final mission
item.description: Executing a dual-launch night demands relentless precision. While strategic nuclear deterrence missions like the unarmed Minuteman III test are scheduled years in advance, spaceport launches are dictated by the requirements of orbital mechanics. When those timelines intersect, the rapid pivot from deploying orbital assets to testing the nation’s nuclear deterrent leaves no room for error.
item.source:markdown:
Executing a dual-launch night demands relentless precision. While strategic nuclear deterrence missions like the unarmed Minuteman III test are scheduled years in advance, spaceport launches are dictated by the requirements of orbital mechanics. When those timelines intersect, the rapid pivot from deploying orbital assets to testing the nation’s nuclear deterrent leaves no room for error.
![U.S. Space Force Col. Dorian Hatcher looks out over the launch operations floor.](https://media.defense.gov/2026/May/21/2003935858/300/300/0/260520-X-EI087-1002.JPG)

item.title: GT-256 Patching Ceremony

item.source:markdown:
Team Vandenberg members gather following the recent launch of an unarmed Minuteman III Intercontinental Ballistic Missile during a patching ceremony at Vandenberg Space Force Base, Calif., May 21, 2026.
![Three people stand and smile. One of them is holding a football.](https://media.defense.gov/2026/May/21/2003935846/300/300/0/260521-X-DW038-1009.JPG)

item.title: How to talk to a journalist

item.title: From Florida to SoCal: The Vietnamese Creator Spotlighting Hidden Gem Restaurants for Millions
item.description:
Moving to California felt healing—and almost like entering "a new country," says Soy Nguyen. For the first time, she saw Vietnamese and Asian cultures openly embraced, a stark contrast to Florida.

item.title: How to ride the D Line Extension’s Section 1
item.description: Metro’s highly anticipated D Line Extension Section 1 opened at 12:30 p.m. on Friday, May 8, with subway service to three new art-filled stations at Wilshire/La Brea, Wilshire/Fairfax and Wilshire/La Cienega.   When it debuts, the D Line will offer fast, frequent and high-capacity subway service connecting Union Station, the heart of downtown L.A., the Westlake District, Koreatown, the Miracle Mile and eastern Beverly Hills. The D Line will often be quicker […]
